relatedKnowledge: Ironclad starts with Bash and Defend — upgrade Bash early for Vulnerable burst.
Shrug It Off and Flame Barrier are premium Act 1 block pickups.
Gremlin Nob punishes skills — block cards are skills. Bring attacks instead.
Ironclad needs front-loaded damage for Act 1 elites: Carnage, Hemokinesis, Anger.
Bash applies Vulnerable (50% more damage) — use it on turn 1 of elite fights.
Against Lagavulin: use 3 sleep turns to play Demon Form or Spot Weakness.
Demon Form is Ironclad's strongest universal scaler — play it early in boss fights.
Limit Break doubles current Strength. Timing is key.
The Champ cleanses debuffs at half HP — burst in one cycle.
The Silent struggles with Act 1 elites due to low front-loaded damage.
Blade Dance and Dagger Throw provide early damage output.
Gremlin Nob punishes Silent very hard — bring attacks and potions.
Noxious Fumes + Catalyst = exponential poison scaling.
Footwork provides permanent Dexterity — Silent's best scaling defense.
Well-Laid Plans lets you hold key cards for the right turn.
Ball Lightning and Cold Snap are efficient Act 1 orb-generating picks.
Sunder carries Act 1 elite fights with high front-loaded damage.
Gremlin Nob: DON'T play skills. Rely on Dualcast and Sunder.
Defragment is the Defect's best scaling card — stack 2-3 if possible.
Glacier provides massive block + 2 Frost orbs for boss survival.
Biased Cognition + artifact = permanent +4(5) Focus.
Frost orbs + Focus = passive block every turn — Beat of Death becomes negligible.
6 Frost orbs × 5 Focus = 42 passive block per turn.
Capacitor increases orb slots — essential for reaching 6+ orbs.
Watcher's Wrath doubles damage — stay in Wrath as long as it's safe.
Eruption+ is the most important upgrade (0 cost Wrath).
Empty Fist + exit Wrath = 28 damage for 1 energy.
Mental Fortress scales block in Wrath — 4(6) block per stance change.
Talk to the Hand applies block per hit — neutralizes multi-enemy fights.
Devotion enters Divinity for 3x damage — Watcher's strongest scaling.
